headline: VICI Properties Inc. (VICI): An Undervalued REIT Stock to Buy Amid Robust Earnings Growth
summary: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) is one of the top undervalued REIT stocks to buy now. On April 29, VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) reported solid Q1 2026 results driven by stronger partner relationships. Revenue in the quarter was up 3.5% year over year to $1 billion, as net income attributable to shareholders increased 60.5% to $872.4 […]

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on VICI Properties Stock?
summary: VICI Properties has lagged the broader market over the past year, but Wall Street analysts remain cautiously optimistic about its forward outlook.
